About Life Comrades

Empowering health and happiness through compassionate home-based care.

Our Mission

To provide compassionate, high-quality healthcare services that empower individuals to lead healthier lives in the comfort of their homes.

Our Vision

To be the most trusted and innovative home healthcare provider in India, setting new standards for patient care and clinical excellence.

The Leadership

Meet Our Founders

Dr. Ramesh Kumar

Founder & CEO

"With over 20 years of experience in critical care and hospital administration, Dr. Ramesh founded Life Comrades to bridge the gap in home-based medical support."

Collaboration

Our Trusted Partners

Apollo Hospitals

Fortis Health

Dr. Lal PathLabs

Community Engagement

Events & Impact

January 15, 2024

Free Health Camp 2024

We organized a free health check-up camp for local communities, serving over 500 seniors.

November 10, 2023

Healthcare Innovation Summit

Life Comrades was recognized for its pioneering work in home-based ICU setups.

Join Our Journey to Better Healthcare

Whether you need care or want to join our team, we're here to make a difference.

Contact UsView Openings

Life Comrades provides trusted home nursing & healthcare services. Our mission is to bring hospital-quality care to the comfort of your home.
